about.title:
Building Scalable
Backend Systems
about.description:
I'm a backend engineer passionate about designing clean, maintainable architectures and building systems that scale. With experience in Django, REST APIs, and database optimization, I focus on solving complex problems through efficient code and intelligent system design.

I specialize in building real-time systems, implementing secure authentication, and optimizing database performance for high-traffic applications. My approach combines strong technical fundamentals with practical problem-solving, ensuring production-ready code that performs well under pressure.

Currently working as a Backend Developer at Raktch Technology & Software, where I build scalable systems for ERP, POS, and CRM platforms. I'm driven by continuous learning and contributing to projects that make a real-world impact.

projects.title:
Smart Healthcare
Data System
projects.subtitle: Secure & Scalable Medical Platform
projects.description: Built a blockchain-based healthcare system with secure patient data storage and real-time access management. Implemented Django REST APIs with PostgreSQL for HIPAA-compliant data handling and encryption.

projects.title:
PetLouma
E-commerce Platform
projects.subtitle: Scalable Full-Stack Online Pet Store
projects.description: Engineered a complete e-commerce platform with JWT authentication, payment integration, and inventory management. Optimized database queries achieving 60% faster load times with PostgreSQL caching.

projects.title:
Learning Management
System (LMS)
projects.subtitle: Secure Authentication & Scalable Learning Platform
projects.description: Developed LMS with role-based access control, course management, and real-time progress tracking. Implemented secure JWT authentication and responsive UI serving 500+ concurrent users.

projects.title:
Real-Time Chat
Application
projects.subtitle: WebSocket-Based Messaging Platform
projects.description: Engineered real-time messaging with WebSockets and Redis, handling 100+ concurrent users with sub-200ms latency. Implemented message persistence, typing indicators, and secure authentication.

projects.title:
Billing & Invoice
Management System
projects.subtitle: Automated Transaction & Invoice Processing
projects.description: Created automated billing system with invoice generation, payment tracking, and reconciliation. Reduced billing errors by 95% with validation and audit trails.

experience.title: Backend Developer
experience.description:
Developing scalable backend systems using Python and Django, focusing on performance, security, and clean architecture.

Designed and implemented RESTful APIs using Django REST Framework to support frontend applications. Optimized database queries and improved system performance through caching and efficient data handling.

Worked on real-world applications, ensuring reliability, maintainability, and scalability of backend services.

experience.title: Web Developer Intern
experience.description:
Worked as a web developer intern, contributing to the development of web applications using Laravel.

Collaborated with frontend developers to build responsive and user-friendly interfaces. Developed backend features and improved application performance through efficient coding practices.

education.title:
B.Sc in Computer Science
& Engineering
education.description:
CGPA: 3.43
Completed a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science and Engineering with a strong focus on software development, backend systems, and database management. Gained hands-on experience in web development, REST API design, and system architecture. Completed a thesis on blockchain-based healthcare systems, focusing on secure and scalable data management.

services.title: Backend Development
services.description:
I build robust and scalable backend systems using Django and Django REST Framework. I specialize in designing clean architectures, developing secure REST APIs, and optimizing performance for real-world applications.

With hands-on industry experience, I focus on writing efficient code, improving database performance, and ensuring system reliability.
services.subtitle: Scalable APIs & System Architecture
services.skills: Python, Django, Django REST Framework, REST API, JWT Authentication, MySQL, PostgreSQL, Caching, Git, Postman

services.title: Full Stack Web Development
services.description:
I develop complete web applications by integrating backend systems with modern frontend technologies. I build responsive, user-friendly interfaces and connect them with powerful APIs to deliver seamless user experiences.

My focus is on creating scalable, maintainable, and performance-driven applications.
services.subtitle: End-to-End Application Development

testimonials.name: Rakibul Islam
testimonials.quote:
Shakil Barua has demonstrated strong technical expertise and professionalism as a Backend Developer at Raktch Technology & Software. 

During his time with us, he contributed significantly to ERP, POS, CRM, and MIS systems, consistently delivering scalable and efficient backend solutions. His dedication, problem-solving ability, and commitment to quality make him a valuable asset to any development team.

testimonials.name: Managing Director
testimonials.quote:
Shakil Barua worked as a Laravel Developer Intern at UNICO IT LIMITED, where he demonstrated strong learning ability, dedication, and teamwork.

He actively contributed to web development tasks, collaborated with senior developers, and showed consistent improvement in both technical skills and problem-solving. His motivation to learn and adapt makes him a promising software developer.

contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.description: I'm open to backend, full-stack, and software engineering opportunities where reliability, clean APIs, and practical delivery matter.
